reviews.review_description: I’m a mod and I love this game if u swear say goodbye to your life (:

reviews.review_title: This has a ton of potential
reviews.review_description: This is an awesome game, and I’m even a moderator now so that’s cool, one complaint I do have is if you fall on only up you have to restart your game, so just make respawn barriers please, other than that GREAT GAME good job onlyvr

This game is a very good game, the owner is nice, the mods are funny and the game is just plain fun. The modes are extremely well done and the horror is really scary. One thing that makes this game stand out is also how this game is not a gtag copy, scary baboon copy, and not a capuchin copy, it is its own original game. And a message to the owner, down listen to the hate this game is amazing and should be way more popular

This is one of the best upcoming gorilla tag fan games. I actually did a video on my YouTube channel all about this game if you would like to watch it.(GGGSPL1)
Also, I got moderator from joining the discord so if you would like to become moderator joining the discord would be the first best thing to do!￼
